blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,259 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
